body.title: Retire devices/igor/web/adc_shim.py — launches old utility_closet_server
body.result: adc_shim.py and claude/shim.py now use WebServerDevice; utility_closet_server.py paths fully removed
body.description:
IgorADCShim in devices/igor/web/adc_shim.py auto-launches utility_closet_server.py on Igor startup if the ADC is down. Now that web_server device replaces utility_closet_server, this shim launches the wrong thing. Also devices/claude/shim.py references utility_closet_server.py for the same reason.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/web/adc_shim.py, devices/claude/shim.py
**Design rules:** none — cleanup
**Scope boundary:** Update shims to reference web_server device startup if needed, or remove if web_server has its own process management. Check what actually starts web_server device.
**Test plan:** Verify Igor starts and ADC is reachable after change
